content.en:
In the following years, Ye Tian went to several places that he didn't dare to go to in the past, but some places were really too dangerous, even if he mobilized his body again and again, and constantly sacrificed his copy body, he still couldn't get benefits.

Therefore, there are places that must be abandoned.

Of course, he also got a lot of good things, and his net worth continued to skyrocket.

Soon after.

The Sumeru Realm Gods of Taihao Tianchao Palace and other pinnacle realm gods traveled the Death Void on the Boundless Sailing Ship, exploring the Death Void, hoping to get more resources, they were all very careful and walked according to the safe route.

Suddenly.

They found that the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass in the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass area was gone, and their expressions changed drastically.

"What about the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass, why are the hundreds of Red Sky Blood Golden Grass gone?"

The peak realm god of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace was extremely puzzled.

"Will it migrate?" said the god of the Sumeru realm, a possibility that he didn't believe in.

"How is it possible to migrate, the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass is rooted here, the ordinary Red Sky Blood Golden Grass is a plant, not a superdimensional creature, only that one is a superdimensional creature. Moreover, the Death Void is full of dangers, and it is impossible for the extradimensional creatures of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass to run around, and besides, this area is most suitable for the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass to reproduce and cultivate, and it is impossible for them to leave. "

"There are traces of the battle here, if my guess is not wrong, that Red Sky Blood Golden Grass extradimensional creature has been killed, and all the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass has been picked!"

"Impossible, the strength of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature is so terrifying, we Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace can't help it if all the dispatches are dispatched, who can kill it?"

"If the top few supreme forces join forces and go all out, there may be hope to kill it!"

"Then how much price do they have to pay, in recent years, I haven't heard of any supreme force that has lost many peak realm gods. "

"There is another possibility, that is, a certain peak realm god has broken through and completely controlled the power of the super dimension, so that he can kill the super dimensional creature of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass~!"

"What, complete control of extradimensional power?"

They were shocked at the thought of this possibility.

If this is really the case, then that peak realm god is the real enemy.

But is that really possible?

"Let's go, there's no need to explore, no matter what the situation is, if the other party can kill the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass superdimensional creature, it's not something we can deal with. "

The pinnacle realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace left, no longer exploring the truth.

......

Before you know it, another period of time has passed.

this day.

The Terrans received a notice from the Realm Tribunal Headquarters that an extradimensional meeting was about to begin, and any peak realm god must be eligible to participate.

Of course, you can also choose not to participate, but every supreme force must have at least one peak realm god to participate.

"Extradimensional meeting, I don't know what to discuss?"

Ye Tian was going to participate, and by the way, he brought his son Ye Xingchen over with him.

......

The extradimensional meeting is set in an extremely secret place in the headquarters of the Realm Court, which is usually under lockdown, and will only be opened when the extradimensional meeting is opened.

Soon.

A peak realm god came here, and Ye Tian also came with Ye Xingchen.

And Ye Tian also noticed the peak realm gods of Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace, they were also looking at him, their eyes seemed to be very calm, but they absolutely hated him in their hearts.

It's just that the current Taihao Heavenly Chaos Palace can't help him at all, and he definitely doesn't dare to show any hostility.

Whoa!!!

The six Peak Realm Gods sat on the top position, while the other Peak Realm Gods did not refute, which was enough to see that the strength of these six Peak Realm Gods was definitely far superior to the other Peak Realm Gods.

"It's them!"

Ye Tian's eyes widened, and he already knew the identities of these six peak realm gods in his heart.

These six should be the pinnacle realm gods among the supreme forces who are called the closest to the half-step transcendent realm, known as the supreme realm gods, this is an honorific title, not a realm name.

The cultivation of these six has reached the level of condensing the twelve Eternal Realm Spirits, and all the Eternal Realm Spirits are perfect Eternal Realm Spirits, and the Eternal Dao Seed is naturally also a Perfect Eternal Dao Seed.

Not only that, but they have reached the limit in every step, and they have fused two extra-dimensional things to create a lot of extra-dimensional techniques.

They have lived a long time and have a lot of Ultra Secret Treasures, and there is more than one medium Super Secret Treasure.

Ye Tian also had a medium-sized super dimensional secret treasure, that is, the Garan Treasure Clothes, but they had several pieces.

In terms of strength, Ye Tianran was far inferior to these six supreme realm gods. []

But even so, the strength of these six should only be slightly stronger than that Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

The key is that they can also absolutely withstand the harm of extradimensional assimilation, so they dare not deal with the extradimensional creatures of the Red Sky Blood Golden Grass.

When they reach their realm, maybe one day they will suddenly comprehend the true extradimensional power and completely solve their physical problems, so they naturally won't take risks casually.

At this time.

A group of peak realm gods greeted these six supreme realm gods one after another.

Soon, one of the six supreme realm gods, the Taiyi Realm Divine said: "'Peak Realm Gods, this time I convened to open an account for the extradimensional meeting, which has something to do with the superdimensional storm. Everyone should know very well that once the extradimensional storm comes, at least within hundreds of extradimensional eras, we will not have any resources to obtain. "

Another Liangyi Realm Divine Being, one of the Six Supreme Realm Gods, said: "I know that many Peak Realm Gods are thinking of buying a quota or staff quota for the Garanbao Ship and leaving our territory, but even if the Garambo Ship will increase the number of places, it will not be too much. Most of the pinnacle realm gods still can't leave, and to be honest, if I want a place on the ship, I can definitely buy it. But so far, I am reluctant to leave, because even if I leave, I may not have a chance to break through, and there will even be risks. "

The other peak realm gods didn't speak, in fact, what the Liangyi Realm gods said was only half.

They knew very well why the Liangyi (Li Zhao's) realm gods didn't leave, because if they stayed here, as long as they didn't seek death, there would be no danger in the opportunity, and they might have the hope of comprehending the power of the transcendent dimension after a long time.

Once the true extradimensional power is comprehended, the Garanbao ship will definitely take the initiative to invite, and it is not just an ordinary employee, but will give many benefits and a high enough status.

Once, among the supreme forces, there were peak realm gods who did this, and a peak realm god who comprehended the true power of the transcendent dimension was born, and finally left with the Garan treasure ship, but that was a long time ago, and many peak realm gods have not seen it today.

But obviously, this time, these six Supreme Realm Gods didn't want to stay here either, and they also wanted to leave Zhi.

"The god of the Taiyi realm, the god of the Liangyi realm...... Say, what is this meeting going to do?"

A pinnacle realm god asked.

The god of the Liangyi Realm said with a solemn expression: "We are ready to deal with the Demon Seed Abyss and snatch the extra-dimensional resources of the Demon Seed Abyss. "。
